unit.name: WP_oEmbed_Controller REST route and proxy behavior
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 wp-includes/class-wp-oembed-controller.php in isolated PHP CLI probes with deterministic REST route/request, permission, transient, local oEmbed, remote oEmbed, WP_Embed, and script registry stubs. It observes route registration, get_item success/error behavior, proxy permission checks, transient cache hits, local response short-circuit, remote data fetch/cache, classic embed handler fallback, and proxy invalid-url errors without claiming full REST server dispatch, live network/discovery, installed rendering, editor/admin flows, database-backed transients, or generated public PHP ownership.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass full REST server dispatch, live/recorded oEmbed provider behavior, installed browser rendering, editor/admin flows, database-backed transient/cache behavior, selected upstream PHPUnit, and ecosystem fixtures before claiming public PHP ownership.
